entries.review_scope: Verified the official GitHub release page binds v6.0.1 to the exact signed commit; pinning controls tag drift, not upstream safety.
Verified the official GitHub release page binds v4.6.2 to the exact signed commit; pinning controls tag drift, not upstream safety.
Verified the official GitHub release page binds v3.0.0 to the exact signed commit; runner compatibility remains an execution-time requirement.
Verified the official Cloudflare GitHub release page binds v3.14.1 to the exact signed commit; pinning controls tag drift, not package or transitive dependency safety.

limits: Release-page and signed-commit identity were reviewed; complete upstream source auditing was not performed.
A 40-character commit pin prevents mutable tag movement but does not prove the action or its dependencies are safe.
Future dependency updates require a new reviewed manifest and re-audit.
